message:
fix: update c_interop to use CPython-compatible ob_type checking

Migrate from old type_id enum to new CPython ABI-compatible type
checking using ob_type pointer comparison:

- numpy.zig: arr_obj.ob_type == &PyBoolArray_Type
- comptime_wrapper.zig: runtime_impl.PyLong_Check(), PyFloat_Check()
- cpython_exports.zig: runtime.Py_IS_TYPE() for list type check
- numpy_comptime_demo.zig: update documentation example

This completes the CPython ABI migration for C extension support.
